title: The Cartographer's Last Meridian 4
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A disgraced Portuguese cartographer in 1519 joins the Magellan expedition not for glory, but to find the island where his exiled daughter vanished, drawing maps that grow increasingly impossible as the fleet pushes past known world into a sea where longitude itself begins to fracture.
long_description: A disgraced Portuguese cartographer in 1519 joins the Magellan expedition not for glory, but to find the island where his exiled daughter vanished, drawing maps that grow increasingly impossible as the fleet pushes past known world into a sea where longitude itself begins to fracture.
